title: CloudFront OAC, Private S3 Origins, and SSE-KMS · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: A Node incident packet contains a plausible private origin authorization contract with one unsafe assertion, stale object identity, unbounded stream, lost rejection, abort leak, cache defect, policy gap, or recovery overclaim; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in private origin authorization contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, distinguish regular S3 origins from website endpoints by HTTPS, OAC, redirects, error pages, methods, and public-access requirements.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, configure OAC with always-sign where appropriate and define viewer protocol, origin protocol, request signing, and forwarded Authorization behavior.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, scope the CloudFront service principal to the exact distribution SourceArn and required object actions without public or cross-distribution access.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug S3 Origin Website Boundary
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 4311 during a regional recovery and budget exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate an OAC origin with exact distribution, ownership, and KMS policy; retain keyboard and screen-reader progress, cancellation, error, and recovery evidence; then change region, retrieval, or transfer cost and defend the revised budget action. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, distinguish regular S3 origins from website endpoints by HTTPS, OAC, redirects, error pages, methods, and public-access requirements.

Inspect the S3 Origin Website Boundary trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug S3 Origin Website Boundary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for in a strict node 24 and typescript 7 service, distinguish regular s3 origins from website endpoints by https, oac, redirects, error pages, methods, and public-access requirements. For S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug S3 Origin Website Boundary, keep S3 Origin Website Boundary connected to executable TypeScript storage and delivery decision evidence.

Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
